title: Zylo Application
description: An application represents a SaaS software product tracked within the Zylo platform, including metadata such as owner, category, spend, and custom fields.

id.description: The unique identifier of the application.

name.description: The display name of the application.

status.description: The current status of the application.

trueUp.description: Whether the application is marked for true-up.

totalSpend.description: The total spend on this application.

subscriptionCount.description: The number of subscriptions for this application.

createdAt.description: The date and time the application was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the application was last updated.

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the application.
